{{Quote|Barkhimkh and I will of course accompany you. Even to death, if that is what awaits us.|Sakhisakh to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Vision of the Future" />}}
'''Sakhisakh''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. He was one of Leia's highest bodyguards. Sakhisakh came from the [[clan Tlakh'sar]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] decided to head to [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] to retrieve the [[Caamas Document]], Sakhisakh recommended to Han to take him, something that was refused. He joined Leia to meet with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] onboard the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] where he viciously refused the idea of peace with the [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="Vision of the Future" />
